name: team-collab
description: Codex entry points and protocol skills for the team-collab documentation workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Run handoffs, checkpoints, and docs refreshes from Codex
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex-friendly team-collab protocol skills. Use $handoff at the end of a session, $checkpoint during long sessions, and $docs-refresh when updating stale Obsidian docs. The team-collab-protocol entrypoint routes to task-specific references for git sync, state docs, TODO ownership, and sensitive-data handling.
